zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne於1295年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾時，她的父親Gui de Chatillon IV37歲，母親Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol27歲。她於1311年與Guillaume de Coucy在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne于1295年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾时，她的父亲Gui de Chatillon IV37岁，母亲Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol27岁。她于1311年与Guillaume de Coucy在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯沙吉波爾-素-特爾諾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯庫希勒-a奧-奧福利可享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Abha, Amit, Gopa, Partha, Prabhat, Sandip, Sanjiv, Shakti, Shyama, Sonali, Sumana, Sumit.  Korean Chae, Jin, Jong, Kheng, Ki Suk, Soon, Sun Kyu, Wan.
Indian (West Bengal) and Bangladeshi: nickname from Sanskrit šūra ‘brave’.

variants.name: Sauer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Heinz, Otto, Achim, Dieter, Erwin, Hans, Helmut, Reinhold, Erna, Florian, Fritz.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for an embittered or cantankerous person, from Middle High German sūr, German sauer ‘sour’. In Jewish families, it is mainly artificial, assigned at random by Austrian clerks. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia.
Czech and Slovenian (Šauer): from German Schauer . In Slovenia, it is in part of Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) origin.

nameMeanings.name: Marne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1 Scottish: perhaps a variant of Mearns , with loss of final -s.
2  English: possibly a variant of   Morrin   (1), with unrounding of [o] to [a]. Some of the later bearers cited here may belong to (1).

variants.name: Morrin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Morin, a diminutive of More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus); see Moore 2 and 3.
English: perhaps sometimes from the Middle English personal name Morwin (Old English Mōrwine, the first element of which is uncertain and the second wine ‘friend’).

variants.name: Marn
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Marne, which is perhaps a variant of Mearns with loss of final -s or else possibly a variant of Morrin 1.
Slovenian: nickname from an old spelling of the archaic adjective maren meaning ‘diligent’, but also ‘worthless’. Compare Maren .

variants.name: Mearns
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the district of The Mearns, an alternative name for Kincardineshire, or from Mearns in Renfrewshire. The placenames derive from Gaelic An Mhaoirne ‘the Stewartry, area under the jurisdiction of a steward’, and is also known to have been adopted in Ireland for Ó Mearáin, see Marron .

en.lifeSummary: When Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne was born in 1295, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Gui de Chatillon IV, was 37 and her mother, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, was 27. She married Guillaume de Coucy in 1311, in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1360, in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne est née en 1295, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Gui de Chatillon IV, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Coucy en 1311, à Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne 1295 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gui de Chatillon IV 37 und ihre Mutter Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol 27. Sie hat 1311 in Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Guillaume de Coucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne è nata il nel 1295 nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Gui de Chatillon IV, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume de Coucy nel 1311, nel Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marneが1295年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼで生まれた時，父Gui de Chatillon IVは37歳，母Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Polは27歳であった。1311年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスサイント-プオル-スル-テルノイゼでGuillaume de Coucyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンコウシ-レ-チaテアウ-アウフリクで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne(이)가 1295년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gui de Chatillon IV(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1311년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 세인트-포-수-터노이스에서 Guillaume de Coucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 코우시-레-cha테오-오프리크에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne nasceu em 1295, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Gui de Chatillon IV, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume de Coucy em 1311, em Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne родилась в 1295 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Gui de Chatillon IV было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Coucy в 1311 г. в местности сеинт-пол-сур-тирноис, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности коуси-ле-чaто-ауффрику, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabeau de Chatillon Sur Marne nació en 1295, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Gui de Chatillon IV, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Marie of Brittany Countess of Saint-Pol, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Guillaume de Coucy en 1311, en Saint-Pol-sur-Ternoise, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Coucy-le-Château-Auffrique, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 65 años.
